text.title: Product Explainability (PM Angle) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying product explainability (pm angle) end-to-end.

step.name: extract-from-research
step.action: Use sonnet to extract problem, who, behaviour_change.

step.name: author-canonical
step.action: Author full narrative: link evidence + set baseline+target.

step.name: render-audiences
step.action: Use haiku to render exec/sales/support/customer versions derived from canonical.
step.decision-gate: If render attempts to add new claims, flag back to PM.

step.name: run-90s-test
step.action: Non-product reviewer reads canonical aloud; confirms can repeat problem + behaviour change.
step.decision-gate: If test fails, rewrite canonical before publishing.

step.name: publish-and-version
step.action: Commit to product-docs; version on every spec change.
